name: Norseman Silver Inc.
summary: Norseman Silver Inc., a junior natural resource company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. It also holds an option agreement to acquire a 100% interest in certain mining claims located in the Province of British Columbia. The company was formerly known as Norseman Capital Ltd. and changed its name to Norseman Silver Inc. in September 2020. Norseman Silver Inc. was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
